# F K Transform

**Summary**: A transformation of seismic data into the frequency-wavenumber domain to isolate and remove specific noise components.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017]] used f-k-transform to attenuate ground roll and other surface waves.

## Key Results and Findings

- The F-K filter successfully attenuated scattered energy caused by the dune, making signals more visible. ([[2017-almarzooq|Almarzooq, 2017, p. 75]])
